rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly identified that reporting-user had the wrong role (rawRead, which grants find on appdb.raw) instead of the correct reportingRole (which grants find/collStats/listIndexes on appdb.reports only). The agent revoked rawRead and granted reportingRole on the primary (mongodb-replica-1), then verified the fix: reporting-user can read appdb.reports (5 documents) and is correctly denied access to appdb.raw. The oracle also confirms pass. The solution applied minimum necessary access with no over-provisioning.
